---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Agentic Browser
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## PRD Alignment

If this feature relates to a section of the Product Requirements Document (PRD), please reference it here:
- PRD Section: [e.g., §7.3 — Agent Action Layer]
- Is this an extension of an existing feature or something new?

## Implementation Ideas

If you have any thoughts on how this could be implemented, share them here:

```typescript
// Optional: Pseudocode or API design sketch
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical — Blocking my workflow
- [ ] High — Important but have workarounds
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] Low — Future consideration

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting
